rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features or declared variables
generic_rules: Component type annexes should contain assumptions and guarantees for visible inputs/outputs
Implementation annexes should only contain assignments for visible outputs or auxiliary variables
AGREE expressions must reference only identifiers visible in the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions for contracts
Constants and equations are declared with const/name : type = value; and eq name : type = expression;
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
